positive: Minimalist line art illustration featuring a single, stylized mountain range silhouette under a crescent moon. The design uses negative space and only two colors: deep indigo and cream. Vector art style, clean lines, perfect symmetry, suitable for embroidery or screen printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, gradients, photorealistic, messy
